reasoning: The HIPAA control 164.312(c)(2) requires mechanisms to authenticate electronic protected health information. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that sensitive data such as secrets and etcd data are encrypted at rest, which helps protect the integrity and authenticity of the data. Additionally, enabling audit log file validation ensures that logs, which may contain sensitive information, are not tampered with. Ensuring API server authentication is enabled helps verify the identity of users accessing the cluster, aligning with the control's requirement for authentication mechanisms.
title: 164_312_c_2: 164.312(c)(2) Mechanism to authenticate electronic protected health information
